Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.StringVerifier

Packages that use StringVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of StringVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return StringVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static StringVerifier DefaultRequirements.assertThat​(String actual, String name)
    Same as DefaultRequirements.requireThat(String, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    StringVerifier Requirements.assertThat​(String actual, String name)
    Same as Requirements.requireThat(String, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    static StringVerifier DefaultRequirements.requireThat​(String actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a String.
    StringVerifier Requirements.requireThat​(String actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a String.

  • Uses of StringVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return StringVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.asInetAddress​(Consumer<InetAddressVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    StringVerifier JavaRequirements.assertThat​(String actual, String name)
    Same as JavaRequirements.requireThat(String, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.asUri​(Consumer<UriVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.asUrl​(Consumer<UrlVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.contains​(String expected)
    Ensures that the actual value contains a value.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.doesNotContain​(String value)
    Ensures that the actual value does not contain a value.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.doesNotEndWith​(String suffix)
    Ensures that the actual value does not end with a value.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.doesNotStartWith​(String prefix)
    Ensures that the actual value does not start with a value.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.endsWith​(String suffix)
    Ensures that the actual value ends with a value.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.isNotEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.isTrimmed()
    Ensures that the actual value does not contain leading or trailing whitespace.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.length​(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    StringVerifier JavaRequirements.requireThat​(String actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a String.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.startsWith​(String prefix)
    Ensures that the actual value starts with a value.
    StringVerifier StringVerifier.trim()
    Trims whitespace at the beginning and end of the actual value.

  • Uses of StringVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension that return StringVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    StringVerifier ExtensibleObjectVerifier.asString()
    Returns a verifier for the String representation of the actual value.
    Method parameters in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension with type arguments of type StringVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S ExtensibleObjectVerifier.asString​(Consumer<StringVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

  • Uses of StringVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement StringVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  StringVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of StringVerifier.
    class  StringVerifierNoOp
    A StringVerifier that does nothing.
